Cleaning company software that runs your field team, payroll & client proof

Replace WhatsApp chaos and spreadsheet rotas with one platform built for janitorial and facilities teams. Schedule jobs, verify on-site GPS clock-ins, sync Google Sheets two-way, run offline mobile checklists, automate payroll, and send branded before/after reports to clients.

Working offline — data safe on device
Offline-First Field App

Your app works without internet — syncs when signal returns

Basements, commercial towers, and low-signal neighborhoods won't stop your team. Cleaners run timers, tick checklists, and capture photos offline. TidyFlow queues everything locally and pushes to the cloud automatically.

  • ✓Full timer & checklist operation with zero connectivity
  • ✓Photos and job notes cached locally until sync
  • ✓Automatic background upload when Wi‑Fi or LTE returns
On-site Geofencing

Geofenced proof that your team is on-site

GPS verifies cleaners against the property boundary on clock-in and completion. Managers see live on-site status during active jobs and get alerts if a cleaner is off-site — no speed tracking, no route history, just presence where it matters.

  • ✓Geofence lock on start and complete
  • ✓Live on-site status during active jobs
  • ✓Manager alerts when a cleaner is off-site

Google Sheets Integration

Manage schedules in spreadsheets, sync in real-time.

Keep your existing sheet layouts and connected tools. Link your master Google Sheet to TidyFlow: dispatcher updates propagate directly to active workforce terminals inside seconds.

  • ✓Two-Way Operations: Cleaners upload hours, properties auto-populate.
  • ✓No lock-in limits: Retain simple, absolute ownership of your company rosters.

Private Gemini Model AI

Roster assignments backed by proactive intelligence.

TidyFlow scans staff calendars, unassigned tasks, and proximity logs, signaling unstaffed positions or schedule risks. Assist team dispatchers with automatic recommended fits inside a single click.

  • ✓Conflict Spotlights: Spot overlaps and staff availability issues instantly.
  • ✓Intelligent Proximity Routing: Suggest nearby operators to lower logistics overheads.
Verifiable Work Captures

Before/After proof, delivered directly to client feeds.

Exceed SLA standards on every clean. Field operators register high-resolution images that post instantly to client reports. Prove visual quality and protect your workforce against false claims.

  • ✓Automatic Watermarking: Timestamps are locked via network data frames to ensure validity.
  • ✓Shareable public portal links: Facility leads verify service quality without password hurdles.

Background Safety system

Lone-Worker SOS Terminal

Emergency SOS Switch Active

Holding this button transmits live GPS logs to active operators and sounds visual warning alarms.

ALARM SYSTEM BROADCASTActive●
Payload: Dispatcher alert logs queued
Target: Facilities security center
Lone-Worker Protection

Immediate safety alarms with precise location maps.

Protect field teams working in basement utility grids or vacant properties. Continuous GPS breadcrumbs map location coordinates history, while a fast SOS switch sounds immediate dispatcher visual alarms.

  • ✓Immediate alerts: Dispatch dashboards flash visual alarms and trigger SMS manager updates.
  • ✓Safety tracking: GPS logs coordinates history to coordinate assistance quickly.

The chaos of spreadsheets and chat groups ends today

Managing cleanings via fragmented checklists on WhatsApp, spreadsheets, and manual payroll math leaks revenue and frustrates team members.

WhatsApp Chaos

No central register of cleaning completions, messy before/after pictures lost in group chat feeds, and zero progress proof when client queries arise.

Stale Spreadsheet Schedules

Manually managing a massive staff roster. Managers waste hours sending schedule alerts, only for rota shifts to conflict with active leave requests.

Payroll Disputes

Cleaners reporting working times manually. Missing exact start/stop timestamps results in continuous, taxing disputes over billable site hours.

One Single, Unified Pipeline

TidyFlow bridges the operational flow between corporate stakeholders, remote management leads, and cleaners on-site. Every action propagates down the chain instantly.

1
Setup Properties & Tasks

Owner establishes properties manually or syncs them seamlessly from Google Sheets.

2
AI-Assisted Rota Dispatch

Managers map rosters. TidyFlow AI highlights distance conflicts and leave states instantly.

3
Field Execution & Verification

Cleaners complete work using offline checklists and start/stop geofenced active timers.

4
Verification & Auto-Billing

Invoices and PDF reports are triggered automatically to clients from validated job logs.

TidyFlow Operational Chain Diagram

1. COMPANY OWNER
Connects Sheets & StripeDatabase Schema Owner
2. MANAGER PANEL
Rota Builder & QAApproves hours and reports
3. CLEANER APP
Timers & ChecklistsOffline-first mobile client
4. FACILITY CLIENT
PDF Proof & InvoicesDirect feedback & billing

6 Core pillars built to scale operations

A comprehensive overview of the essential tooling built straight into the platform core.

Scheduling & Dispatch

Roster team rotas, coordinate calendar schedules with clear live alerts, and automate recurring property cleaning visit frequencies easily.

GPS Timer Tracking

Track cleaners' locations during active jobs. Start, pause, resume, and submit hours with bulletproof geofence safety boundaries.

Before/After Quality Proof

Provide visual documentation for clients. Cleaners capture arrival and departure conditions which are secured inside PDF client portfolios.

2-Way Spreadsheet Sync

Never abandon your spreadsheets. Keep properties and rota schedules synchronized continuously with a master Google Sheet template.

Team & Payroll HR

Review worked time slips, define customized per-user wage rates, manage sick and holiday leave, and auto-export formatted payslip packages.

TidyFlow AI

Deploy server-side AI model suggestions to assign cleaners, score photo cleaning quality, and deliver valuable business risk highlights.

The 4-Step Operational Flow

Simple setup to day-to-day work dispatch in minutes.

1

Set Up Properties

Import your property register manually or sync instantly by connecting your master Google Sheet database template.

2

Rota Schedules

Map week roster timelines. Dispatch jobs instantly using drag-and-drop mechanics or get smart AI recommended assignees.

3

Verify On-Site

Cleaners execute duties utilizing real-time, offline checklists. Clock times are logged with geofenced GPS locks.

4

Payroll & Reports

Generate validated payroll wage details and dispatch professional, white-labeled cleaning PDF proof documents to clients.

FINANCIAL COMPLIANCE

Automated Payroll, Transparent Timesheets

Consolidate contractor and field cleaner work hours automatically. Avoid hours of transcription from manual paper trails: approve background-validated timestamps, compute gross salary payouts dynamically, and export branded customer invoice records.

  • ✓Custom wage configurations mapped per operator contract.
  • ✓One-click exports to standard accounting portals.
